purpose: Expose the exact weakened relative operational theorem to independent criticism, countermodel search, proof review, mechanization strengthening, and bounded empirical replication without widening the proved claim.
authorized_claim: The registered relative RCCD theorem is proved at the executable compositional level under its frozen premises and finite maximality boundary; the complete semantic theorem is not one kernel-checked proof object.
required_disclosures: Unknown is neither support nor defeat

decision_rules.confirmed_defect: open a versioned claim-impact record and revise or retract the affected claim
decision_rules.unresolved_challenge: record Unknown; do not count as support or defeat
decision_rules.failed_independent_replication: preserve the failure and assess its impact without repairing the protocol post hoc
decision_rules.successful_independent_review: upgrade only the evidence dimension actually reviewed
decision_rules.kernel_checked_terminal_reconstruction: may support reconsideration of the full registered outcome through a newly registered adjudication program

workstreams.deliverable: canonical public disclosure and repository integration
frozen independent proof review package; external findings pending
single proof-assistant reconstruction or explicit obstruction report
